title: The SCP Containment mod
description: This mod seeks to add SCP's both well known and not
body:
In this mod you will have to find the SCP's some where in your world. They are very Rare so try not to lose them. You will find all sorts of SCP's in this mod from the living room to the procrastination stone. All of them will do different things see if you can figure it out. Good luck.

Also available on curseforge here: [https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-scp-containment-mod](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-scp-containment-mod)

Current SCP's in the mod


   - SCP - 001 The Gate Guardian

   - SCP - 002

   - SCP - 007

   - SCP - 063

   - SCP - 067

   - SCP - 085

   - SCP - 109

   - SCP - 261

   - SCP - 500

   - SCP - 622

   - SCP - 914

   - SCP - 1161

   - SCP - 2107

   - SCP - 025 - J

   - SCP - ____ - J

   - SCP - 429

   - SCP - 6468

   - and more...

How to use SCP-914 and make it in MCreator:
